---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.  
Example: "I'm always frustrated when I use provider X and the tool enforcement doesn't handle..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've already tried.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, links, or references that might help explain the request.

---

> ✅ If you're willing to implement this yourself, mention it here — PRs are always welcome!
